description: CRMOne is an AI-first CRM for startups and growing businesses that unifies sales, marketing, and customer support with unlimited users and no feature restrictions.
tagline: AI-driven CRM for sales and marketing
overview: CRMOne is an AI-first CRM built for startups and growing businesses. It brings sales, marketing, and customer support together in a single platform with unlimited users and unrestricted features, so scaling teams avoid the per-seat costs common with other CRM solutions.
what_is: CRMOne is an AI-first CRM designed for startups and growing businesses. It automates key workflows across sales, marketing, and customer support within a single platform. Its most notable offering is unlimited users with no feature restrictions, making it practical for teams that are scaling and want to avoid incremental per-seat costs.

CRMOne handles sales pipeline management, marketing automation, customer service, workflow automation, and data-driven reporting. Teams typically report faster collaboration and improved sales efficiency shortly after setup, along with more personalized customer engagement driven by the platform's AI capabilities.

The platform combines CRM, email marketing, calling, chatbot support, and data enrichment in one place. It is not aimed at large enterprises requiring highly customized configurations or industries that depend on complex ERP-level features. It is best suited to companies looking for an accessible, all-in-one business toolkit that covers the full revenue cycle without technical overhead.
